Author: XeldarAlz
Name: LastHit
Punchline: Fires your PvP Limit Break at a configurable HP threshold to last hit enemies.
Description: Fires your job's PvP Limit Break when the target's HP drops below a configurable threshold. Threshold is set as a percent of max HP or an absolute HP value. Optionally auto-selects the lowest-HP hostile in range when no manual target is set. Commands: /lasthit, /lasthit config.
